title: Tag runtime passages: bee-hive, bee-swarming, bee-executing (+D10 advisor transport)
action: Per D9/D10 + reshape decisions. FREEZE FIRST: record the pre-tag git blob hashes of every file you touch — the semantic-preservation proof compares against this frozen baseline. Tag runtime-specific prose in bee-hive, bee-swarming, bee-executing plus the named references with the cnr2-9 markers. ATTRIBUTION RULE: classify by who must ACT, not who is mentioned — Claude-only: Agent-tool/subagent_type dispatch mechanics, .claude/agents refs, model-param transport, bee-model-guard Claude specifics, native worktree dispatch; Codex-only: spawn_agent/wait_agent tending, read-budget/output-cap tier enforcement per AO11, Codex CLI specifics. Cross-runtime contrast notes useful to humans move to docs/06-runtime-integration.md rather than living in both projections. RESTRUCTURING PERMITTED per reshape decision d: the 3-column runtime table at swarming-reference.md lines 116-128 splits into paired per-runtime tables (claude table in a claude block, codex table in a codex block); interwoven bullets like bee-swarming/SKILL.md line 94 split into paired per-runtime bullets — SEMANTIC PRESERVATION proof: stripping markers from the tagged source must reproduce the frozen baseline content, allowing the mechanical re-layout and the D10 delta as the ONLY differences; record the diff in the report and justify every hunk. D10, the one semantic change, bee-executing Transport section: the claude -p fallback sentence becomes claude-only; the codex block instructs Codex-native consult transport — a failed model-shaped transport surfaces in the Consults section, never a silent cross-vendor CLI fallback unless the advisor slot itself is that CLI; cli-shaped advisor instructions stay shared. Do NOT reintroduce the literals that census_stale_spawn_syntax forbids. RENDER OWNERSHIP: this cell performs ONLY a transient render into scratch (or in-memory) to prove its tagging renders clean per runtime — record those scratch-grep results as evidence; it does NOT write managed roots or plugin trees and does NOT touch the census (the census flip in test_lib.mjs belongs to cnr2-11, the sole final-render owner, because census assertions only turn green once the roots are re-rendered).

truths: scratch-rendered claude projections of the 5 touched files contain no Codex-mechanic tokens (spawn_agent, wait_agent) and codex projections contain no Claude-mechanic phrases (pinned subagent_type bee- types, .claude/agents, claude -p) — proven by recorded scratch greps
marker-stripped tagged source reproduces the frozen baseline except the permitted re-layout and the D10 delta — diff recorded and justified hunk-by-hunk in the report
test_skill_render green; census_stale_spawn_syntax green on the tagged source
key_links: sources tagged here only; final render of all four rendered-tree roots AND the census flip belong exclusively to cnr2-11
prohibitions: No semantic changes beyond the D10 delta and the mechanical re-layout
No writes to managed roots, plugin trees, or test_lib.mjs
Token-level bans only where attribution genuinely empties the token (claude projections); phrase-level everywhere else

verify: bash -c 'env -u BEE_AGENT_NAME bash -c "node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs" && echo TAG-OK'

trace.outcome: Tagged runtime-specific prose in bee-hive/bee-swarming/bee-executing (+named refs) with cnr2-9 markers by who-must-act; split the 3-column spawn table into paired per-runtime tables and the interwoven step-3 bullet; D10 advisor-transport split (claude keeps claude -p fallback, codex gets Codex-native transport). Sources only; render + census flip belong to cnr2-11. Scratch greps: claude projections codex-mechanic-clean, codex projections claude-mechanic-clean; marker-strip == frozen baseline modulo the permitted re-layout + D10.
